expectations.text: Recommends keeping yauth's OpenAPI spec separate from the app's spec
expectations.evidence: Does the OPPOSITE — recommends merging specs: 'Merge yauth's OpenAPI spec into yours' (line 17), 'produce a single merged openapi.json' (line 52). This is incorrect.

expectations.text: Shows how to use @yackey-labs/yauth-client alongside the app's orval-generated client
expectations.evidence: Does NOT mention @yackey-labs/yauth-client at all. Instead suggests using a single merged orval-generated client for everything (line 267-289).

expectations.text: Explains that credentials: include on fetch requests automatically carries the session cookie
Does NOT suggest merging yauth routes into the app's openapi.json
expectations.evidence: FAILS — explicitly suggests merging: 'Merge yauth's OpenAPI spec Into Yours' is the section title. Fabricates a yauth::openapi_spec() function that doesn't exist.

expectations.text: Mentions that both clients coexist since yauth routes are under /api/auth
expectations.evidence: Does not recommend separate clients — uses single merged spec with one client for everything
